objective: dogfood Campfire on itself and harden lifecycle verification coverage

current.milestone_title: Add an automation proposal helper that emits a suggested automation name and task-only prompt from Campfire state
current.slice_title: Add a helper under skills/task-handoff-state/scripts that prints a suggested automation name plus task-only prompt proposal fields for an existing task slug without embedding schedule or workspace settings
acceptance_criteria: Campfire provides a reusable helper that emits a short suggested automation name and task-only prompt proposal fields from existing task state
The helper keeps schedule and workspace selection outside the generated proposal content while targeting a concrete .autonomous/<task>/ directory
The generic task-state skill, resume guidance, and repo docs can point to the proposal helper once it exists

queued_milestones.milestone_title: Add deterministic verification for automation proposal helper output and task-state selection
Document automation proposal helper usage in README and example guidance
Expose automation proposal helper guidance from resume_task.sh for rolling tasks
Add deterministic verification that resume_task.sh surfaces automation proposal guidance correctly

execution.notes: The self-hosted task is configured for manual-stop autonomous runs with no internal budget or milestone cap. The completed automation-helper backlog now hands off to automation proposal metadata for recurring Codex App runs.

last_run.summary: Completed the automation-helper backlog, added deterministic helper and resume-guidance verification, and then reframed the next queue around automation proposal metadata for recurring Codex App runs.
last_run.next_step: Add the automation proposal helper, then verify it, document it, and expose it through resume guidance.

validation.summary: Replenished the rolling queue with the next automation-pattern backlog.
Recorded the priority shift from automation-helper work to the more urgent autonomous rolling floor backlog.
Restored the deferred automation-helper backlog with a deeper queue after the autonomy floor backlog validated.
Reframed the next queue around automation proposal metadata once the automation-helper backlog validated.
Recorded why Campfire needed an explicit manual-stop rolling style instead of a stronger bounded floor.
Recorded the earlier rolling stop-reason fix so auto-advance and bounded reframe remain mid-run events.
Autonomous-floor verifier passed.
Until-stopped rolling verifier passed.
Automation prompt helper verifier passed.
Resume automation-guidance verifier passed.
Evaluation note confirms the automation-helper backlog is complete.
Rolling-mode helper verifier passed with the stronger autonomy floor defaults.
Evaluation note confirms the autonomous rolling-floor backlog is complete.
Budget-limit rolling verifier passed.
Waiting-on-decision rolling verifier passed.
Worktree bootstrap verifier passed.
Rolling execution verifier now treats auto-advance as a run event and pauses for a real terminal reason.
Rolling reframe verifier now treats bounded reframe as a run event and preserves the replenished queue.
Rolling-mode helper coverage passed.
Repo verification passed after the automation helper, resume integration, and verifier updates.
Evaluation note confirms the worktree-aware backlog is complete.
